important.subject:
Editorial Invitation: Saharsh | Feature Profile for 2026 Portable
 Cabins Edition
important.snippet: Respected Harshad Chandak, Good afternoon. Our research team has been tracking engineering leaders establishing strong standards in industrial development, and *Saharsh* has stood out in this space. I represent Prime Insights. We are currently preparing our upcoming review: *“India’s Most Trusted Company Providing Office Portable Cabins Delivering Flexible and Space-Efficient Infrastructure Solutions 2026."* Given your market presence, we would like to evaluate your leadership for our primary profile coverage. If we move forward, the publication includes the following elements for your organization: - *Magazine Cover Page:* Full image of your key executive on the front cover. - *6-Page Dedicated Article:* In-depth story covering your corporate journey, struggles, and achievements, written by our staff. - *5 Full-Page Advertisements:* Five corporate ads placed in any of our upcoming issues within a year. - *Media Announcements:* Press release will be publish on our official website and
important.reason: Editorial invitation for Saharsh, related to portable cabins

I am very open to hearing and understanding the concerns being raised. However, for such a discussion to be meaningful and aligned with the spirit of the BNI Code of Ethics, it is important that: 1. The specific instances being referred to are clearly identified, and 2. During the discussion, both sides of each interaction are read, known, and fully understood by the Retention Coordinator, Member Engagement, and anyone else present on the call, before drawing conclusions on non-adherence. important.snippet: Hi Hailey. We thank you for your valuable email. We have thoroughly studied your quotation and discussed your products. We found your product range vast and explicit. Problem is:- We are trying to introduce these products in the Indian markets which is very price sensitive. For introduction sake, we have to keep our pricing very low, else chances of its acceptance are very less. We request you to re-consider your quotation. Our counter offer - a 20% discount on the quoted prices. You may remove trims and SPC floors from your quotation and give us a 20' container entirely of SPC walls and its skirting (same models as discussed in the video call and said in your quotation). important.subject: Re: PU foam insulation in Portable cabins.

important.subject: PU foam insulation in Portable cabins.
important.snippet: Dear Mr. Thomas. We thank you very much for imparting us your valuable knowledge earlier today. As discussed, we are manufacturing Portable cabins in Navi Mumbai (Taloja) and currently using Glasswool as an insulation between outer GI corrugated sheets and internal MDF boards. We wish to upgrade to PU foam via injection methodology. We have used DOW make PU foam in bottle form (attaching some pics for reference), but we want to reduce costs and ease of working. As a trial, we request you to kindly support us with a trial procedure on one of our cabins and also help us in establishing a continuous set-up for the same at our works. Outer surface is 1.2 mm Corrugated GI sheets and internal surface is 8 mm Cement fibre boards. In future, we wish to replace GI sheets with 8 mm plyboard and then spray insulation from outside (instead of current procedure where we are spraying from inside). Looking forward to your support in establishing long term business relations. Regards, Sharad Chandak 9
important.reason: Email from Sharad Chandak, a key person, about portable cabins.

important.subject: Helping Saharsh Generate More High-Value Project Inquiries
important.snippet: Hi Harshad, I hope you’re doing well. I recently came across Saharsh and was impressed by how you’ve established India’s premier luxury modular construction brand, delivering high-end engineered structures across multiple locations and global markets. My name is Aseem Pandey, and I represent Codexon, a digital growth agency that helps businesses improve online visibility, generate qualified leads, and increase conversions through data-driven marketing strategies. important.snippet: Hi Harshad, Writing to reconnect on the message I sent earlier. I am Chief Operating Officer at MDSPL, a BIM consulting company that provides Virtual Design and Construction solutions to architects, engineers, and construction firms around the world. At MDSPL, we work closely with companies like Saharsh, co-creating solutions that translate virtual planning into real-world construction, helping projects stay on schedule, within budget, and maintain high quality standards. Please let me know a good time to connect, or you can book directly via our calendar link.<https://calendly.com/rahul-d-mdspl/30min> Respectfully, Mukesh Jangir Chief Operating Officer Mer

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Albert, and I am the Sales Manager at our company, which has been specializing in high-quality garden structures since 2020 in China. Albert

important.subject: HVS ANAROCK HOPE 2026 | Partnership Opportunities
important.snippet: Dear Harshad, Following our recent conversations, I am pleased to share more details about HVS ANAROCK HOPE 2026, scheduled for February 26-27, 2026, at Taj Cidade de Goa. After three successful editions, HOPE has established itself as India's most influential hospitality and travel summit, bringing together global leaders, investors, policymakers, and industry stakeholders to discuss trends, opportunities, and the future of the sector. We would be delighted to explore a partnership with your esteemed organization for this landmark event. As a partner, Saharsh will benefit from high-impact brand visibility, direct engagement with senior decision-makers, and access to curated networking opportunities designed to deliver strategic value. important.subject: DOW silicone and PU foam.
important.snippet: Hi Mr. Neeraj. We thank you for giving us your valuable time during our visit to Dow facility in Navi Mumbai earlier this month. We were able to gather valuable insights from Ravi sir regarding various applications of silicone and its use case in our modular prefab industry. We are in process of sourcing 789 P+ and 898 silicone. We request you to kindly schedule a factory visit of your representative to help our staff understand the application procedures and use cases of these silicones. We also request you to schedule a meeting of your PU foam department for us to understand its use case in our industry. We are currently using glasswool insulation, but we wish to upgrade to PU foam technology. Regards, Sharad Chandak Saharsh Prefab | Portable Cabins and Prefab Structures Manufacturing units: https://goo.gl/maps/K6opP48sWzxYKoZP8 https://goo.gl/maps/jLE8KskPCcvhRS6p6 | https://goo.gl/maps/kd37ikRZnsoswRpR8 | https://goo.gl/maps/K6opP48sWzxYKoZP8 | https://goo.gl/maps/RZHLo6zZ9SccXadK8

important.subject: Re: lower lead costs
important.snippet: Hey Harshad, The launch of Qbinn Resorts and its innovative container homes got me thinking again. Since your focus on unique modular spaces is key in real estate, I had a few ideas on how purchase-focused ad creatives could drive more engagement for your projects: - Highlighting the sustainability aspect of container homes could attract eco-conscious buyers. - Showcasing unique design features in targeted ads can resonate with your specific audience. - Using customer testimonials in campaigns could refine your outreach and boost credibility. Anyway, just some thoughts on how purchase-focused ad creatives could help elevate your hospitality ventures. Did you get a chance to check out my first email? important.snippet: Dear *Harshad Sir,* *Greetings from the Indian Institute of Management, Ranchi!* I, *Sayee Pratap*, am reaching out on behalf of the Corporate Relations and Placement Committee of *IIM Ranchi*. It is with great honour that we extend a warm and cordial invitation to *Saharsh* to participate in the *Summer Internship* and *Final Placements* drives during the upcoming Placement Season 2025-26 at *IIM Ranchi*. With a proud legacy spanning *16 years*, we at *IIM Ranchi* have meticulously crafted three programs: *MBA*,* MBA-BA, *and flagship *MBA-HR,* to meet the evolving needs of today’s business world. As you will remember, our commitment to each other as BNI Members is that we will not miss more than three meetings in a six-month period without a substitute. A substitute can stand

important.subject: Art & Literature Fair | August 3, 2025
important.snippet: Dear Mr. Harshad We're hosting an art fair to bridge the gap between artists and art lovers, creating a vibrant platform where creatives can showcase their work, connect directly with buyers, and foster meaningful relationships within the art community. Our diverse lineup features both emerging talents and renowned established artists. Beyond the art, we'll offer handcrafted products, interactive workshops, and intimate book and poetry readings - all designed to inspire, educate, and help everyone - artists and attendees alike - discover purpose through their passions.
